seoTitle: How to Cancel Your GoHighLevel Free Trial
metaDescription: Learn the exact steps to cancel your GoHighLevel free trial quickly, plus what to consider before you do.
intro: If GoHighLevel isn't the right fit or you simply want to stop your trial before it converts to a paid plan, cancelling is straightforward once you know where to look. This tutorial walks through the cancellation steps and what to weigh before deciding.

steps.heading: Locate your account settings
steps.body: Log in to GoHighLevel and go to the account or billing settings where subscription management lives.

steps.heading: Find the cancellation option
steps.body: Within the billing section, locate the option to cancel your trial or subscription.

steps.heading: Confirm the cancellation
steps.body: Follow the prompts to confirm you want to cancel, ensuring your trial doesn't convert to a paid plan.

steps.heading: Consider your alternatives first
steps.body: Before cancelling, weigh whether a different plan tier or feature set might better suit your needs instead of leaving the platform entirely.

faq.question: Will I be charged if I cancel before the trial ends?
faq.answer: No, cancelling before your trial period ends should prevent any charge from being applied.

faq.question: Can I still access my data after cancelling the trial?
faq.answer: Access to your account and data typically ends once the trial is cancelled, so export anything important beforehand.

faq.question: Can I restart a GoHighLevel trial after cancelling?
faq.answer: This depends on GoHighLevel's current policies, so it's worth checking with their support before assuming you can restart a trial.

faq.question: Is there a way to pause instead of fully cancelling?
faq.answer: Some platforms offer a pause option, but this varies — check your account settings for what's available to you specifically.
